Class True

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.axiom_abstraction.AbstractDomainElement
de.uka.ilkd.key.axiom_abstraction.boollattice.BooleanDomainElem
de.uka.ilkd.key.axiom_abstraction.boollattice.True
All Implemented Interfaces:
Named
public class True extends BooleanDomainElem
The True element of the boolean lattice, representing exactly the boolean true.

      Returns:

    • getDefiningAxiom

      public JTerm getDefiningAxiom(JTerm varOrConst, Services services)
      Description copied from class: AbstractDomainElement

      Return the defining axiom, instantiated for a given Term (skolem constant or logical / program variable). The term can be seen as a representative of this abstract domain element; the returned formula must formally specify this.

      If this element describes, for instance, all numbers divisible by 2, the method could return the formula "varOrConst % 2 == 0".

      Specified by:
      getDefiningAxiom in class AbstractDomainElement
      Parameters:
      varOrConst - The logical / program variable or skolem constant representing an instance of this abstract domain element.
      services - A services object.
      Returns:
      A JavaDL formula expressing that the given variable or constant represents an instance of this abstract domain element.

    • toParseableString

      public String toParseableString(Services services)
      Description copied from class: AbstractDomainElement
      Returns a parseable String representation of this AbstractDomainElement. It should always hold that, for an AbstractDomainElement e and the corresponding AbstractDomainLattice l, that l.fromString(e.toParseableString(), services).equals(e).
      Specified by:
      toParseableString in class AbstractDomainElement
      Parameters:
      services - The services object.
      Returns:
      A parseable String representation of this domain element.
